title: Developing a Multilingual Chatbot
scenario: Design a multilingual chatbot that provides customer support in multiple languages, including translation and cultural adaptation. The target LLM output should be a detailed specification document outlining the chatbot's capabilities, dialogue flow, and potential UI elements. Ensure the document is 2-3 pages in length and includes relevant technical details.
constraints: Must use a specific machine translation technology
Should include a minimum of 3 languages
Should include a diagram of the system architecture

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the specification document accurately outline the chatbot's technical requirements?
Are the included languages relevant to multilingual support?
Is the dialogue flow diagram clear and easy to understand?
Are the included UI elements relevant to a multilingual interface?
